name: pi-context-eval
description: Run and audit provenance-safe Saffron 400K versus 1M evaluations for pi-context.

interface.shortDescription: Run and audit formal Saffron context matrices.
interface.longDescription: Prepares immutable pi-context checkouts, runs or resumes fixed Saffron 400K/1M cells, distinguishes task outcomes from invalid infrastructure, and summarizes provenance-bearing evidence.
defaultPrompt: Run a formal Saffron 400K versus 1M matrix.
Audit and summarize this Saffron matrix run.
